RecurringInvoice.Description:
FIRE SERVICES MAINTENANCE AGREEMENT
Start Date: 16/05/2024
Approved Quotation No: 139641
Total Value Per Annum: $595.00 + GST
Payment Frequency: ANNUALLY in Advance.
 
SCOPE OF WORKS
Level 1 & Level 2, Regular Servicing & Maintenance of Fire Protection Equipment for the above premises in accordance with the relevant Australian Standards, we are pleased to submit the following revised quotation for your approval. This proposal is for 3 years with the option of extending for another year. 
 
NOMINATED EQUIPMENT - MONTHLY TESTING
12 x Tests - Automatic Fire Detection System: AS1851-2012 Sec 6
TOTAL INVESTMENT $595.00 + GST PER ANNUM
TO BE BILLED ANNUALLY IN ADVANCE
 
Please note:
- This quote does not include a fire safety audit, which will form the outcome of the fire safety statement.
- This total cost does not include the annual fire safety statement.

Each service call will be booked in advance. The attending technician will contact the facility maintenance staff prior to the commencement of service and report to them again prior to leaving site.

ADDITIONAL ANNUAL MAINTENANCE AVAILABLE ON REQUEST PRICE ON APPLICATION
• Annual Fire Safety Statement by an APFS
• Test and Tagging

EXCLUSIONS
Consumables such as Spare Parts, Work outside of normal hours, Anti-Tamper Seals, Maintenance Tags, Repairs to Serviced Equipment mentioned above, Barcode labels, Monthly testing of Hydrant Systems, Batteries for Fire Indication Panels and all parts associated with Annual Testing, Pressure Test/Recharge on Extinguishers, 5 yearly Hydrant Tests, 5 Yearly 100% Detection Tests, Fire Plans, Emergency Callouts, Brigade monitoring fee’s, Works in accordance with Passive Fire and Smoke Containment Systems not mention in the serviced equipment, Annual Survey Reports in accordance with AS1851 sections 2 – 9 accordingly, Administration Fees, All required Test Books and 5 Yearly Speech Intelligibility Test on EWIS System.  Level 3, Level 4 & Level 5 Services for Extinguishers will be at an additional charge

Please Note:
All equipment must be serviced on the same day if we have to return a fee will apply.
Parking must be provided on-site, otherwise, parking fee will be charged back to the customer.

LABOUR RATES
Normal Hours 8 am – 4 pm $ 145.00 per Hour excluding GST
After Hours 4 pm – 8 am $ 220.00 per Hour excluding GST
Site Attendance Fee includes travel and first hour on-site $ 350.00 excluding GST

Normal hours call outs will be billed on the normal hourly rate and will start from the time of the request to attend site with the minimum billable period being no less than two hours. After Hours call outs will be billed on the after-hours rate and will start from the time of the request to attend site with the minimum billable period being no less than four hours.
 
PAYMENT TERMS:
Prior arrangements are to be made with the management of Red Men Fire Protection in regards to payment terms. Management will at their discretion accept 50% upon order and 50% at completion of works prior to certification being issued. New clients will be required to pay 100% for works prior to works being undertaken.

AFTER-HOURS EMERGENCY SERVICE - 1300 725 594
After hours call outs will be billed on the after-hours rate and will start from the time of the request to attend site with the minimum billable period being no less than 4 hours. We include all administration costs & travel. 

DEFECT ACTION REQUIRED NOTICE (D.A.R.N)
We issue D.A.R.N. reports if any faults that require maintenance or repairs are found, to effect repair, to bring it in line with current Australian Standards. This is billable at $4 per notice.

EARLY CANCELLATION OF AGREEMENT
If this agreement is canceled prior to it's agreed end date Redmen Fire Protection reserve the right to invoice the client the balance of the agreement for which the client shall be held liable.  This is due to pricing is calculated on the length of the agreement.
